response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, cloud technologies, and AI-adjacent infrastructure (e.g., AI-agent frameworks, MCP code generators), meeting the 15-year requirement and demonstrating technical versatility. However, his background lacks direct AI product development, entrepreneurship in AI, or recognized expertise in AI (e.g., publications, patents, or high-impact AI platforms). His startup (GISCollective) is geospatial-focused, not AI-centric, and his roles emphasize general software engineering over strategic AI leadership.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, cloud)
Strong technical leadership in open-source projects and team mentorship (e.g., workshops, refactoring dojos)
Proven ability to architect scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No clear evidence of AI-specific product development or strategic AI leadership in past roles
Lacks advanced AI degrees (PhD/Master's) or recognized AI expertise (e.g., no AI publications or patents)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is geospatial-focused, not AI-related
